mapper.sql: id, user_id, week_start, week_end, weekly_rank, all_rank, weekly_population, all_population, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_cockpit_rank_snapshot ( user_id, week_start, week_end, weekly_rank, all_rank, weekly_population, all_population, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{weekStart}, #{weekEnd}, #{weeklyRank}, #{allRank}, #{weeklyPopulation}, #{allPopulation}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE week_end = VALUES(week_end), weekly_rank = VALUES(weekly_rank), all_rank = VALUES(all_rank), weekly_population = VALUES(weekly_population), all_population = VALUES(all_population), update_time = NOW()
